name: Fruit Pockets
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in the butter using two spatulas until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring until a dough forms.
4. Turn onto a lightly floured surface and knead briefly.
5. Roll out to 1/3 inch thickness. Cut into ovals, each about 4 inches long.
6. Combine raisins, nuts, orange juice, lemon juice, spices, currants, citron, and sugar in a bowl.
7. Place 1 tablespoon of the filling on half of each oval.
8. Brush the edges of the dough with egg white.
9. Fold over the fillings to enclose them completely.
10. Press firmly together to seal, then press lightly to flatten.
11. Make three short cuts across the top of each oval with scissors.
12. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
13. Place 2 inches apart on a well-oiled baking sheet.
14. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) until evenly browned.
